name: @storno/anaf-agent
description: Local mTLS proxy agent for ANAF SPV — supports hardware USB tokens (SafeNet, Feitian, certSIGN)

scripts.package: npm run bundle && pkg build/agent.cjs --targets node20-macos-x64,node20-macos-arm64,node20-win-x64,node20-linux-x64 --output build/storno-agent && node scripts/set-windows-icon.mjs build/storno-agent-win-x64.exe
scripts.package:macos: npm run bundle && pkg build/agent.cjs --targets node20-macos-arm64 --output build/storno-agent-macos
scripts.package:windows: npm run bundle && pkg build/agent.cjs --targets node20-win-x64 --output build/storno-agent-windows && node scripts/set-windows-icon.mjs build/storno-agent-windows.exe
scripts.package:linux: npm run bundle && pkg build/agent.cjs --targets node20-linux-x64 --output build/storno-agent-linux
